title: parallel-o-smash pipeline parameters
description: Parallel antiSMASH 8 runs across many genomes, powered by Nextflow.

input_output_options.title: Input / output options
input_output_options.description: Where to find genomes and where to put results.

input.description: FASTA glob (e.g. '/data/*.fasta') OR a CSV samplesheet with columns sample,fasta,gff.
input.help_text: Detected by extension: values ending in .csv are validated against assets/schema_input.json as samplesheets; anything else is treated as a glob and each match becomes a sample. In glob mode, --gff_pattern controls how sibling GFF files are located.

gff_pattern.description: Filename of the GFF file expected next to each FASTA (glob mode only).

use_gff.description: If true, pass --genefinding-gff3 to antiSMASH for non-empty GFF entries. Falls back to genefinding_tool when missing.

resource_options.title: Resource options
resource_options.description: Per-task resource requests. Memory and time scale with task.attempt on retry.

memory.description: Memory per antiSMASH task (will be multiplied by task.attempt on retry).

time.description: Wallclock per antiSMASH task (will be multiplied by task.attempt on retry).

max_retries.description: Number of automatic retries after OOM (137/140) or timeout (143).

antismash_core_options.title: antiSMASH core options
antismash_core_options.description: Settings that map to top-level antiSMASH flags.

genefinding_tool.description: Gene-finding algorithm used when no GFF is supplied. Default 'error' matches antiSMASH's own default: the run fails if no annotations are present, forcing an explicit choice.

minlength.description: Only process sequences larger than this (nt).

databases.description: Path to the antiSMASH databases directory. Leave null to use the install-bundled databases.

extra_args.description: Free-form extra flags appended to the antiSMASH command (quoted).

debug.description: Add --debug to antiSMASH (produces very verbose logs).

antismash_module_options.title: antiSMASH module presets and toggles
antismash_module_options.description: Choose a preset and/or override individual modules. Toggles set to null inherit from the preset.

as_preset.description: antiSMASH module preset. Toggles below override the preset.

rre.description: RREFinder precision mode on RiPP clusters.

rre_cutoff.description: Bitscore cutoff for RRE pHMM detection.

smcog_trees.description: Phylogenetic trees of secondary metabolite cluster orthologous groups.

tfbs.description: Transcription factor binding site finder on clusters.

cassis.description: Motif-based prediction of SM gene cluster regions (fungi).

allow_long_headers.description: Allow sequence identifiers longer than 16 characters.

html_start_compact.description: Use compact view by default on the HTML overview page.

html_ncbi_context.description: Show NCBI genomic context links for genes.

help.description: Display the pipeline help message and exit.

validate_params.description: Validate parameters against the schema before running.
